commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=2b67ec8b9ce5880a6bd791f8566bb5b5fb594048)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Discord/channel progress-mode suppression so block/tool replies are preserved when the progress preview is configured to render no label, no tool lines, and no commentary, with focused tests for that path.

PR surface: Source +21, Tests +52. Total +73 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: default progress mode still makes suppression true, while the first progress-draft work event can remain behind the 5 second delayed draft gate. I did not run a live Discord/Codex reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor revision and real Discord proof are needed before merge; missing external real behavior proof keeps this out of ClawSweeper repair automation.

target.title: fix(discord): preserve tool updates when progress preview is empty
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Fixes #87704. In Discord `streaming.mode=progress`, OpenClaw could suppress standalone tool/block progress messages even when the configured progress preview lane stayed empty. That left operators without visible tool updates during fast-tool or no-preview turns.

## Why This Change Was Made

- Keep default tool progress visible when progress-mode config cannot render preview content (`label: false`, `toolProgress: false`, and no commentary).
- Keep block-reply suppression tied to an active/non-empty progress preview lane, while preserving suppression when the progress draft is actually visible.
- Rewrite the boolean gate in `src/channels/streaming.ts` with named booleans so the lint rule no longer flags redundant boolean comparisons.
- Include the current-main `check-test-types` unblock for `OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH` so CI is not red from an unrelated test type error.

## User Impact

Discord operators keep seeing meaningful tool/block updates when progress preview mode is enabled but has no content to render. Existing visible progress draft behavior stays suppressed as before, so the fix only restores the fallback path for empty preview lanes.

## Evidence

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts src/channels/progress-draft-compositor.test.ts src/agents/session-tool-result-guard.tool-result-persist-hook.test.ts` passed.
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.draft-preview.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.ts src/channels/progress-draft-compositor.test.ts src/channels/streaming.ts src/agents/session-tool-result-guard.tool-result-persist-hook.test.ts` passed.
- `& .\node_modules\.bin\oxfmt.cmd --check --threads=1 extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.draft-preview.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.ts src/channels/progress-draft-compositor.test.ts src/channels/streaming.ts src/agents/session-tool-result-guard.tool-result-persist-hook.test.ts` passed.
- `pnpm tsgo:core:test`, `pnpm tsgo:core`, and `pnpm tsgo:extensions:test` passed.
- `git diff --check` passed.
target.author: lin-hongkuan
